name: Krunchy Karmel Korn Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Puffed popcorn curls -OR-, popped popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 250°F (121°C). Line a jelly-roll pan with foil.
2. In the foil-lined pan, combine popcorn, pretzels, and peanuts.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and corn syrup. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Reduce heat; simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in baking soda and vanilla.
5. Pour the mixture over the popcorn mixture in the pan; toss to coat evenly.
6. Bake at 250°F (121°C) for 30 minutes, stirring twice during baking. Immediately remove from the pan onto a new piece of foil.
7. Allow the mixture to cool completely, breaking it into pieces as it cools.
8. Toss with candies. Makes 11 cups.
